shopping_242.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent returned a link to a thumbnail image instead of a larger, higher-resolution image of the fireplace from another angle.
2. The agent did not attempt to click on the thumbnail image or explore other options on the product page to find a larger version of the image from the desired angle.
shopping_242.REFLECTION: When asked for an "image link," always strive to find and return the link to the largest available image of the desired subject and angle. After identifying a suitable image thumbnail, investigate if clicking on it or interacting with the image gallery reveals a larger version or a different URL for a higher-resolution image.
shopping_242.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent returned a link to a thumbnail image instead of a larger, higher-resolution image of the fireplace from another angle.
2. The agent did not attempt to click on the thumbnail image or explore other options on the product page to find a larger version of the image from the desired angle.

REFLECTION:
When asked for an "image link," always strive to find and return the link to the largest available image of the desired subject and angle. After identifying a suitable image thumbnail, investigate if clicking on it or interacting with the image gallery reveals a larger version or a different URL for a higher-resolution image.
